hooks.command: FILE=${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}; case "$FILE" in *rule-engine*.yaml) echo "[rule-lint] $FILE modified — run /rule-lint to validate.";; esac
FILE=${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}; case "$FILE" in *.go) which go >/dev/null 2>&1 && go fmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac

Stop.command: echo ''; echo '═══ LinkRSP Session End ═══'; git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" status --short 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo 'Tip: /pre-commit before next push.'
